ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Um guys I know this is weird for me asking my pookies for this , but you know I kinda work hard to create bots and I was thinking if you would like to support me on my journey.. we're so close to 10k it had always been my dream so I was wondering if I should start doing paid commissions..not too much not to expensive kofi and buy me coffee methods don't work here in my country...so I was thinking of direct..fund transfer to me I'm so sorry if it is weird but this is what i thought

3$ for requesting a bot (will take longer time to make)

5$ to create a bot (it will be created in 2 days)

It's fine if you don't want to do that at all but I would love it if you guys did support me and if you do get interested just..join my server and send me a message I'll reach asap...

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Thankyou for listening to my rant I love y'all stay blessed pookies mwaaaah
